title: Kadhal Vanthum Sollamal Lyrics Saravana
stanzas:
Kadhal vandhum sollaamal
nenjukulle yaengum ennai
kollaathe sollaamal sellaathey

Kadhal vandhum sollaamal
nenjukulle yaengum ennai
kolvaayo un kadhal solvaayo

idhayathile oru vali
imaigalile pala thuli
nee sendraal kooda
kadhal sugamaagum.
nee pirinthaal ulagam
urugum mezhugaagum

vaarthai ondrile
vazhkai thandhidu
boomi pandhaiye orey
sollil suthidu.

vidhiyin kaigalo
vaanam pondradhu
puriyum munname
manam saambal aaguthu.

ninaivu idari mannil
vilugirathe nizhalil
karaindhu adhu saagaathaa

kadhal kathari ingu
azhugirathe irandu
kannum adhil karugaathaa

yaenthaan kathal valarthen
adhai yaeno ennul puthaithaen
sudar illaatha theeyil
erigindren
sudum kanneeril kaditham
varaigindren

penne.. un paathaiyil
nagarum maramaaguven
oh ho oh
iravai thindru
vazhnthaai neeyadi
idhayam kondu
ponaal ennadi.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of Kadhal Vanthum Sollamal?

The song explores the theme of unspoken love and the emotional turmoil it brings.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song is sung by Prasanna and Saindhavi.

Who composed the music for Saravana?

The music was composed by Srikanth Deva.

What is the release year of the movie Saravana?

The movie was released in 2006.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In the movie Saravana, Kadhal Vanthum Sollamal is a poignant song that delves into the complexities of unexpressed love. The lyrics convey the inner conflict and longing experienced by the characters, capturing the bittersweet essence of romance. The melody, enriched by Srikanth Deva's composition, evokes a sense of nostalgia and yearning. Prasanna and Saindhavi's soulful rendition adds depth to the emotional narrative, making it a memorable piece in the film.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Kadhal Vanthum Sollamal from the movie Saravana is a captivating romantic melody that beautifully captures the essence of unspoken love. Sung by the talented duo Prasanna and Saindhavi, this song is enriched by Srikanth Deva's soulful music. Dive into the emotional depth of this track and experience the magic of love conveyed through its heartfelt lyrics.
stanzaMeanings: Even when love comes, without saying it, it lingers in the heart. Don't let it destroy me, don't leave without saying it.
Even when love comes, without saying it, it lingers in the heart. Will you destroy me, will you express your love?
There is a pain in the heart, many tears in the eyes. Even if you come, love will be sweet. If you leave, the world will melt like wax.
With one word, life is given. The earth spins with just one word.
Is it fate's hands that are like the sky? Before understanding, the mind turns to ashes.
Memories fade away on this earth, melting in the shadows. Will they never die?
Love cries out here, shedding tears. Will both eyes not burn in it?
Why did I nurture love and then bury it within me? I burn in a fire without light, writing letters with burning tears.
Girl, I will become a tree swaying in your path. Oh, you lived by devouring the night. What if you take my heart away?
Even when love comes, without saying it, it lingers in the heart. Will you destroy me, will you express your love?
Even when love comes, without saying it, it lingers in the heart. Don't let it destroy me, don't leave without saying it.
Even when love comes, without saying it, it lingers in the heart. Will you destroy me, will you express your love?
There is a pain in the heart, many tears in the eyes. Even if you come, love will be sweet. If you leave, the world will melt like wax.
With one word, life is given. The earth spins with just one word.
Is it fate's hands that are like the sky? Before understanding, the mind turns to ashes.
